calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar May-21-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Cynthia Lee for Jason Lew.

Ms. Lee stated that she went to the Assessor's Office, that the County records show that Ms. Jane Wu (Ex Wife of Decedent) has a 1/12 ownership, that the estate of Mr. Lew also has a 1/12 ownership and that they want to have this confirmed. Ms. Lee also stated that the parties want the entire 1/3 of the property to go into the trust, that at death he and she each owned 1/12 and that the Mom is going to be transferring hers directly to the Son. The Court questions why the Mom doesn't put it back into the trust. Ms. Lee stated that the Mom has already signed the deed and that this will make it easier. The Petition for Order Confirming Trust Assets is under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Mar-25-2019 Continued To Apr-29-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
